name: click-memory-guard
description: Enforces click's memory-guard deny-by-default scan on Engram mem_save calls made by OpenClaw agents, mirroring Claude Code's PreToolUse hook (design #1666, decisions OCG-1..6).
_verifyAtApply: This manifest's filename (plugin.json), top-level shape, and hook-registration key are a DOCUMENTED BEST GUESS (design #1666's 'Verify-at-apply-time' items 1-2) — no live OpenClaw Plugin SDK reference was available to this apply session. main/entry/hooks.before_tool_call all point at the SAME file (plugins/hooks.js) so whichever key OpenClaw's loader actually reads, it resolves correctly. This key itself is intentionally non-standard and can simply be deleted if OpenClaw's loader ever turns out to enforce strict-schema validation on unknown top-level fields.
